summary: Admin customers page correctly displays success state with proper mobile narrow layout. Dark admin theme maintains visual separation from public marketing surfaces. All required controls and table data are present and accessible at 390px viewport.
actions: Verify search functionality filters by customer name/email as specified
Confirm status filter dropdown works with all/active/suspended/deleted options
Test billing health column sorting toggle behavior
Validate quick actions (suspend/impersonate) appear for appropriate customer states
Ensure horizontal scroll access to all table columns and actions on mobile
